title: Germany Signals Ukraine May Need to Cede Territory for EU Membership and Peace Deal
detail: Germany has suggested that Ukraine will likely have to cede territory in order to achieve both a peace deal with Russia and EU membership, according to reporting by The Independent. The signal marks a significant shift in European negotiating posture, indicating that key NATO and EU partners are moving toward accepting territorial concessions as a precondition for ending the war and advancing Ukraine's European integration path.
